issues.line: R1: `calculate_cost` must validate token counts (integers >= 0) and non-empty model; invalid inputs raise `ValueError`.
issues.message: Rule [R1] has no modal verb (MUST / MUST NOT / MAY / SHOULD / DOES NOT).
issues.suggestion: Add a modal verb: "The system MUST …" or "The service MUST NOT …".

issues.line: R2: Known Claude model families must resolve via prefix/substring matching; unknown models raise `ValueError` listing supported families.
issues.message: Rule [R2] has no modal verb (MUST / MUST NOT / MAY / SHOULD / DOES NOT).
issues.suggestion: Add a modal verb: "The system MUST …" or "The service MUST NOT …".

issues.line: R3: Cache write tokens are charged at 1.25× the standard input rate; cache read tokens at 0.10× the standard input rate.

issues.suggestion: Add a modal verb: "The system MUST …" or "The service MUST NOT …".
